/usr/bin/c++  -mmacosx-version-min=14.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/DeviceLinkTests.dir/DeviceLinkTests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeviceLinkTests.dir/tests/test_protocol.cpp.o -o DeviceLinkTests -F/usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib -F/usr/local/Cellar/qtserialport/6.10.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/qtserialport/6.10.2/lib libDeviceLinkCore.a /usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest /usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /usr/local/Cellar/qtserialport/6.10.2/lib/QtSerialPort.framework/Versions/A/QtSerialPort /usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers -framework Security -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation -framework IOKit
